# Wayline â€” Project Analysis & Next Steps
*Generated by Claude Code, 2026-06-09*

## Project Overview

Wayline is a self-hostable maps API platform (Google Maps alternative).

**Stack:**
- **Backend:** Node.js + Express (`api-gateway/`)
- **Frontend:** Next.js 15 (`frontend/` â€” separate repo: `wayline-nextjs`)
- **Database:** PostgreSQL + PostGIS (`postgres/`)
- **Routing:** OSRM with pre-processed southern-zone data (`data/osrm-data/`)
- **Geocoding:** OpenCage API (placeholder until Pelias is set up)
- **Infrastructure:** Docker Compose orchestrates all services

---

## Current State (as of 2026-06-09)

### What works
- Docker Compose infrastructure fully configured (5 services)
- OSRM routing engine with pre-processed data for the southern zone
- API endpoints exist: `/api/route`, `/api/geocode`, `/api/reverse-geocode`, `/api/roads`
- Next.js frontend shell: login page, NextAuth, dashboard layout with protected routes, map renders

### What is broken / incomplete

| # | Issue | File | Severity |
|---|-------|------|----------|
| 1 | DB pool uses wrong env vars | `api-gateway/app.js:18` | Bug â€” `/api/roads` fails |
| 2 | `npm start` points at non-existent `index.js` | `api-gateway/package.json` | Bug â€” local start fails |
| 3 | Invalid SQL in init file | `postgres/init.sql:6-7` | Bug â€” fresh DB crashes |
| 4 | Auth uses hardcoded mock users | `frontend/lib/auth.ts` | No real user system |
| 5 | No users/api_keys tables | `postgres/init.sql` | Schema missing |
| 6 | No API key endpoints | `api-gateway/app.js` | Feature missing |
| 7 | No API key middleware | `api-gateway/app.js` | Routes unprotected |
| 8 | API Keys page is a placeholder | `frontend/app/dashboard/keys/page.tsx` | UI not wired |
| 9 | Search bar not connected | `frontend/components/HomePageClient.tsx` | UI not wired |
| 10 | Map has no routing logic | `frontend/components/Map.tsx` | Static marker only |

---

## Recommended Next Steps (Sprint Order)

### Sprint 1 â€” Bug Fixes & DB Schema (do first, unblocks everything)
1. Fix DB connection: `new Pool({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL })`
2. Fix `package.json` start script: `index.js` â†’ `app.js`
3. Fix `init.sql`: remove `#` comment and `USER postgres` line
4. Add `users` and `api_keys` tables to `init.sql`

### Sprint 2 â€” Real Authentication
5. Add `POST /auth/register` (bcrypt hash, save to DB)
6. Add `POST /auth/login` (bcrypt compare, return JWT)
7. Replace mock users in NextAuth with real DB call

### Sprint 3 â€” API Key System
8. Add `POST /api/keys`, `GET /api/keys`, `DELETE /api/keys/:prefix`
9. Add `protectWithApiKey` middleware (SHA-256 hash check)
10. Apply middleware to `/api/route`, `/api/geocode`, `/api/reverse-geocode`

### Sprint 4 â€” Frontend Wiring
11. Wire API Keys dashboard page (fetch, generate, delete)
12. Connect search bar â†’ `/api/geocode`
13. Add click-to-route to Map (two clicks â†’ fetch route â†’ draw GeoJSON polyline)

### Sprint 5 â€” Infrastructure / Deployment
14. Set up Cloudflare Tunnel (local backend â†’ public HTTPS URL)
15. Set `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL` in Vercel + add `NEXTAUTH_SECRET`

---

## Architecture Notes

- `frontend/` is a **separate git repo** (`wayline-nextjs`) nested inside this folder
- The 10 GB `data/` directory should **never** be committed to git
- All 5 Docker services communicate via Docker's internal DNS (service names as hostnames)
- Future: migrate to AWS EC2 with Docker Compose; frontend stays on Vercel or moves to CloudFront
